projects.name: Automation Engine
dialogue: Built reliable test automation focused on reducing false positives.
Turned brittle checks into maintainable suites with clearer signals.

projects.name: Release Guardian
dialogue: Created regression coverage around high-risk user journeys.
Improved delivery cadence by catching failures before staging drift.

projects.name: Project Revelium
dialogue: Designed the analysis and scoring layer for test observability.
Connected execution data to actionable quality signals for teams.

projects.name: Signal Lab
dialogue: Mapped flaky behavior patterns to root-cause categories.
Used concise telemetry to separate noise from product risk.

projects.name: Tabula QA
dialogue: Explored DOM mapping and intelligent locator extraction.
Shaped QA tooling that reads interfaces the way analysts do.

projects.name: Career API
dialogue: Packaged experience, projects, and skills into reusable developer tooling.
Focused on clean interfaces, modular systems, and practical delivery.
